title: $3,100 Passive and Consistent
author: ColdWinterDaze
selftext: Friends, I want to share a story that influenced my future. I had to work hard because I had children and a wife. Every day at work, I thought about how to earn more money to provide for my family. Once, I decided to take a day off and relax. I took my wife and children, and we went to an amusement park. We had a great time and met a family who was also vacationing with their children. We decided to go to a cafe to get to know each other better. During the conversation, the man offered me a job that at first seemed unrealistic to me, but the next day I decided to try it and was pleased with the result. I am very grateful to you, u/crowjudgement. Now my income is over $300 a day. If anyone is interested, the post is still active, u/crowjudgement.
